details.note: Basic pg.Pool with no retry, no health check, no graceful degradation. Pool config is hardcoded.
DatabaseConfig already has poolSize (default 10), url, ssl config keys. Ready to extend with more pool config options.

details.summary: PG-004: Production Postgres connection pool done. 3 files modified, 2 files created. Typecheck: 0 errors. Tests: 20 pass.
